ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag of the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization number */,
  "mmsi" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the vessel in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used */,
  "engine_power" REAL /* Engine power in horsepower */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the vessel owner */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the vessel operator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel undertaking the trip */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trip */,
  "origin_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin port */,
  "destination_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination port */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain in charge */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members on board */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the trip in nautical miles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_origin_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_destination_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "docking_fee" REAL /* Fee for docking at the port */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the port in terms of vessel size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the position is recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vessel's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vessel's position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vessel at the recorded position */,
  "course" REAL /* Course of the vessel at the recorded position */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the position is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip detail */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the details are recorded */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo carried */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the cargo */,
  "expected_arrival" TEXT /* Expected arrival date at the destination port */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival date at the destination port */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data at the time of the trip */,
  "cargo_value" REAL /* Value of the cargo */,
  "cargo_description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_details_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_details_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the consumption is recorded */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of the consumption */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "fuel_cost" REAL /* Cost of the fuel consumed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel for which the maintenance is recorded */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next date when maintenance is due */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in the region */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in the region */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Wave height in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude_range" TEXT /* Latitude range of the region */,
  "longitude_range" TEXT /* Longitude range of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "environmental_zone" TEXT /* Environmental zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the alert is generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip report */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary content of the report */,
  "captain_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the captain */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the detailed report file */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Assessment of the environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_reports_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
